member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:DocumentsController.CreateDocument(CreateDocumentRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new document
member.returns: Created document with ID and status.

member.name: M:DocumentsController.GetDocument(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a document by its ID.

member.name: M:DocumentsController.SendDocument(System.Guid)
member.summary: Sends a document (changes status from Draft to Sent).

member.name: M:DocumentsController.SignDocument(System.Guid,SignDocumentRequest)
member.summary: Signs a document by a employee phone number.

member.name: M:DocumentsController.GetPageDocuments(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{DocumentStatus})
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of documents with optional status filter.

member.name: M:DocumentsController.SearchEmployeeId(System.Guid)
member.summary: Searches documents signed by a specific employee.
member.returns: List of documents signed by the employee.

member.name: M:DocumentsController.DeleteDocument(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a document by its ID.

member.name: M:DocumentsController.UpdateDocument(System.Guid,UpdateDocumentRequest)
member.summary: Updates the title of an existing document.

member.name: M:EmployeesController.GetPageEmployees(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of all employees.

member.name: M:EmployeesController.GetEmployee(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves an employee by its ID.

member.name: M:EmployeesController.CreateEmployee(CreateEmployeeRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new employee.

member.name: M:EmployeesController.UpdateEmployee(System.Guid,UpdateEmployeeRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing employee.

member.name: M:EmployeesController.DeleteEmployee(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an employee by its ID.

member.name: M:EmployeesController.SearchByPhone(System.String)
member.summary: Searches for an employee by their phone number.

member.name: M:OrganizationsController.GetPageOrganizations(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a paginated list of all organizations.

member.name: M:OrganizationsController.GetOrganization(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves an organization by its ID.

member.name: M:OrganizationsController.CreateOrganization(CreateOrganizationRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new organization.

member.name: M:OrganizationsController.UpdateOrganization(System.Guid,UpdateOrganizationRequest)
member.summary: Updates an existing organization.

member.name: M:OrganizationsController.DeleteOrganization(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes an organization by its ID.

member.name: M:OrganizationsController.AddEmployeeInOrganization(System.Guid,AddEmployeeRequest)
member.summary: Adds an existing employee to an organization.

member.name: M:OrganizationsController.DeleteEmployeeFromOrganization(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes an employee from an organization.

member.name: M:OrganizationsController.TransferEmployeeBetweenOrganizations(TransferEmployeeRequest)
member.summary: Transfers an employee from one organization to another.
member.param: Source organization ID, target organization ID and employee phone.
member.response: Invalid phone number or employee cannot be transferred.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
